title: 30o: expand_url_template should not be pub
description:
Location: crates/jmap-chat/src/blob.rs line 30.

expand_url_template is declared pub but is only ever called within blob.rs (upload_blob, download_blob) and in unit tests in the same file. No caller in jmap-chat-tui or any other crate uses it.

Why burden: a solo maintainer reading the public API surface must decide whether to keep it stable or break callers — but there are no external callers. Any future refactor of the URL-expansion logic must treat this as a breaking change unnecessarily.

Suggested fix: change to pub(crate). If a future caller in jmap-chat-tui needs it, promote at that time with a real use case.
